results.title: Dynacor’s largest shareholder remains concerned about governance despite AGM outcomes
results.description: Following TSX-listed artisanal ore processor Dynacor Group’s AGM and election of COO Daniel Misiano as president and CEO of the group, Dynacor’s largest shareholder Iolite Partners remains concerned about the company’s conduct, disclosure and board entrenchment. Swiss investment manager Iolite has repeatedly said Dynacor has enormous potential but the leadership needed to realise it is “clearly lacking” as the company’s own AGM presentation affirmed.

results.title: Scottish Government to exclude vape shops from business rate relief
results.description: Deputy first minister Jenny Gilruth revealed a proposal to make vape businesses exempt from relief as of April 1, 2027

results.title: One Atmosphere to invest Rs 500 crore for the expansion of luxury service apartments vertical
results.description: ONE Atmosphere is investing Rs 500 crore to expand its luxury service apartments, aiming for 7500 keys in India and abroad over five years. This move taps into India's booming extended-stay market, driven by demand for quality, space, and hotel-like services in residential settings. The brand, part of Atmosphere Core, will launch its first property in Gurgaon in 2026, with further expansion planned across India and key international destinations.

results.title: Shree Cement Ltd. (1W) – Ascending Triangle Breakout Setup.
results.description: NSE:SHREECEM On the weekly timeframe, Shree Cement appears to be forming an ascending triangle structure after a prolonged correction from its all-time highs. Price is now testing a major horizontal resistance zone near ₹25,990 while simultaneously respecting a rising trendline support, creating a potential breakout setup. The stock is approaching an important decision point where a successful breakout could trigger a fresh bullish trend toward higher Fibonacci levels. Chart Structure – Ascending Triangle Formation After declining from the ₹31,000+ zone, the stock found support near ₹22,550 and began forming higher lows. The rising trendline indicates steady accumulation by buyers, while repeated tests of the ₹25,990 resistance suggest increasing pressure on supply. This combination has created an ascending triangle pattern, which is generally considered a bullish continuation or reversal structure when confirmed by a breakout. Key Support Levels ₹25,253 – Immediate Support / Entry Zone ₹23,362 – Rising Trendline Support ₹22,550 – Major Swing Support As long as price remains above the rising trendline and major support zone, the bullish structure remains intact. A weekly close below ₹22,550 would invalidate the bullish setup and could trigger a deeper correction. Breakout Level ₹25,990 – Breakout Entry Level This is the most important resistance on the chart. A strong weekly close above ₹25,990 would confirm the ascending triangle breakout and increase the probability of a move toward higher Fibonacci targets. Volume expansion during the breakout will be an important confirmation signal. Upside Targets Target 1: ₹26,678 Target 2: ₹27,414 Target 3 / Reversal Confirmation: ₹28,115 Target 4: ₹29,430 Extended Fibonacci Resistance: ₹30,365 The measured move shown on the chart suggests a potential upside of approximately 13% from the breakout area if the pattern plays out successfully. Fibonacci Levels & Risk Management The chart contains multiple Fibonacci support levels below the current price. These levels can act as reaction zones during pullbacks. For future reference, if price breaks above a resistance level but subsequently makes a higher high and closes back below that resistance, it would indicate a failed breakout and traders may consider reducing exposure or booking profits. Momentum & Volume Analysis Weekly RSI is currently near 54 and moving higher. RSI has crossed above its moving average, indicating improving momentum after a prolonged consolidation phase. Volume has remained stable during the base-building process, and a breakout accompanied by higher volume would significantly strengthen the bullish case. Trading Perspective Bullish while price holds above ₹25,253 and the ascending trendline support. A weekly breakout above ₹25,990 would confirm the ascending triangle pattern and open the path toward ₹26,678, ₹27,414 and ₹28,115. A sustained move above ₹28,115 would signal a stronger long-term trend reversal and increase the probability of a rally toward ₹29,430 and ₹30,365. The structure remains constructive as long as higher lows continue to form above the rising trendline. Disclaimer: This analysis is for educational and informational purposes only. It is not financial advice or a recommendation to buy or sell any security. Please do your own research and consult with a qualified financial advisor before making any investment decisions. Stock market investments are subject to market risk.
